titles.title: Let the Holy Blood of Jesus Flow Through Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From the Sacrifice on Calvary, From His hands, from His side, From His feet, Oh, the Blood how it flowed To set men free From age to age to every generation It still flows for our salvation Let the holy Blood of Jesus Flow through me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Flow through me, flow through me Let the holy Blood of Jesus Flow through me Let the pow'r that poured from the Cross Pour through this vessel To reach the lost May the holy Blood of Jesus Flow through me. (Let the holy Blood of Jesus Freely flow through me.)
